message:
fix: set sync.mode=dolt-native in DB during bd migrate --to-dolt (dolt-test-cb6x)

Without this, ShouldExportJSONL defaults to git-portable mode after
migration, causing 10-25s JSONL export on every bd write operation.
Discovered by gastown/max via gt-dookzl investigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
